name: arbitrum.gmx.perpetuals
description: Professional AI agent skill for GMX V2 perpetuals on Arbitrum. Open/close positions, monitor risk, and analyze markets.
author: ArbiLink

actions.name: trade_long
actions.description: Open a leveraged long position on GMX V2

actions.name: trade_short
actions.description: Open a leveraged short position on GMX V2

actions.name: close_position
actions.description: Close an existing GMX V2 position

actions.name: analyze_market
actions.description: Get deep market insights including funding, OI, and AI signals

actions.name: monitor_risk
actions.description: Start real-time liquidation monitoring for a wallet

api.description: Requires Arbitrum RPC and optional Agent Identity Registry API keys
